inputs.label: Face Value
inputs.businessContext: The nominal value of the bond, paid at maturity.

inputs.label: Coupon Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual coupon rate as percentage of face value.

inputs.label: Years to Maturity
inputs.businessContext: Number of years until the bond matures.

inputs.label: Yield to Maturity
inputs.businessContext: Annual discount rate (market interest rate) for the bond.

inputs.label: Coupon Frequency
inputs.businessContext: Number of coupon payments per year (e.g., 2 for semiannual).

formulas.bondPrice: periodRate === 0 ? (periodCoupon * numPeriods + inputs.faceValue) : (periodCoupon * (1 - Math.pow(1 + periodRate, -numPeriods)) / periodRate + inputs.faceValue * Math.pow(1 + periodRate, -numPeriods))
